scripts.dev: bun run verify:runtime && bun run dev:backend
scripts.e2e:contract: cd packages/backend && bun test tests/contract tests/workspaceAssistant.test.ts tests/assistantAttentionE2E.test.ts tests/coordinatorReconciler.test.ts tests/assistantTools.test.ts tests/projectReconciler.test.ts tests/passOutcomeCoordinator.test.ts tests/runAttemptStore.test.ts tests/coordinatorBootstrap.test.ts tests/multiRepoC1.test.ts tests/assistantReflection.test.ts tests/mvpServer.test.ts tests/adapterConfig.test.ts tests/previewManager.test.ts tests/goalController.test.ts tests/vendorTransport.test.ts tests/attentionDelivery.test.ts tests/roleContextStager.test.ts
scripts.e2e:preflight: bun run e2e:contract && bun run test:browser
scripts.e2e: bun run e2e:preflight && bun run e2e:live
scripts.check: bun run verify:runtime && bun test scripts/verify-runtime.test.ts && bun run check:backend && bun run check:frontend
